description: Let AI agents interact with serial devices — list ports, connect, send, and read.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.es617/serial-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Plugin policy: 'all' or comma-separated plugin names. Unset = disabled.
environmentVariables.name: SERIAL_MCP_PLUGINS

environmentVariables.description: PTY mirror mode: 'off' (default), 'ro' (read-only), or 'rw' (read-write). macOS/Linux only.
environmentVariables.name: SERIAL_MCP_MIRROR

environmentVariables.description: Base path for PTY symlinks (default /tmp/serial-mcp when mirror is enabled). Connections get numbered: /tmp/serial-mcp0, /tmp/serial-mcp1, etc.
environmentVariables.name: SERIAL_MCP_MIRROR_LINK

environmentVariables.description: Tool name separator character (default '.'). Set to '_' for clients that reject dots (e.g. Cursor).
environmentVariables.name: SERIAL_MCP_TOOL_SEPARATOR
